features: Status India to UK adapter for safe plug conversion Status provides a reliable solution for converting Indian plugs to UK sockets, perfect for visitors travelling from India to the United Kingdom. A must-have for powering Indian electronics safely and easily while abroad.

Converts Indian 3 pin plugs to standard UK 3 pin socket This adapter allows appliances fitted with Indian-style round pin plugs to connect securely into UK mains outlets. Ideal for mobile chargers, laptops, grooming kits or small appliances brought from India for temporary or permanent stays.

10 amp rating suitable for daily electronic devices With a 10 amp capacity, this adapter supports common electronics and household items that require moderate power. It’s designed for efficient, safe use without overheating or voltage issues when used with compatible UK power supply.

Single unit ideal for guests, students or business travel Supplied as a pack of one, this adapter is ideal for individuals visiting the UK for work, study or leisure. Compact and portable, it easily fits in luggage or hand baggage for convenience during travel.

Clean white finish with sturdy, secure construction Featuring a neutral white finish, this adapter blends well with modern UK sockets and electrical setups. Designed with a firm, stable fit, it keeps Indian plugs securely connected while in use, avoiding accidental disconnection.
